title: What's new in Looker: Empowering business users in the governed agentic era
summary: Google Cloud presented advancements in Looker and Gemini for business intelligence, including dashboard agents that automate workflows, a semantic layer for grounding AI, conversational analytics, and embedded analytics capabilities. The platform aims to empower business users in an agentic era through governed data access and shared pre-trained agents.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech outlines recent additions to Looker and Gemini for business intelligence, centered on bringing AI agents into governed analytics. The video covers dashboard agents that automate workflows, a semantic layer that grounds AI in defined business metrics, conversational analytics, and embedded analytics capabilities. The stated goal is to let business users work with data through agents while preserving governed data access and shared pre-trained agents.
